steps.t: Ghân-gharâf is located far below the Flooded Deeps, beyond a series of partially-flooded caverns. Bróin wishes for you to witness the return of Zigilb…

Bróin has told you to tell Bori that Zigilburk has been left with Óin in the flooded chamber.
You are on hand to witness the sealing away of Zigilburk.
